models.model: Brawny XM MTB Mountain Electric Bike

all.Classes: Off-Road (Ebikes can go up to 37mph with pedal assistance)
all.Max Speed: Up to 37 MPH on Pedal Assist; 20 MPH on Throttle
all.Range: Avg. 75 Miles* on PAS, up to 85 Miles on Level 1, 60 Miles* on Throttle (Range Per Charge is measured under the conditions that power is sufficient, with a 75kg load, at 86°F (30°C), 70% humidity, on a level road, in pedal assist mode with level 1 assistance, and in pure electric riding mode by throttle. Actual results may vary based on differences in temperature, load, wind speed, road conditions and other factors.)
all.Frame: 6061 Alluminum Alloy with Internal Battery, with Front and Rear Suspension, Frame Travel 139 mm
all.Fork: Air Suspension Fork with 100mm travel, with lockout
all.Rear Suspension: Rockshox RS-MNR-R-C4 184X44 air spring with 44mm travel, with external rebound adjustment
all.Front Wheel Spokes: Black Stainless 13G x 255/257 mm, Front and Rear
all.Battery: Removable Internal Lithium-ion Battery 48V 20Ah (960Wh) with LG cells
all.Display: TFT Smart Easy Read Display with Backlight, Colorful screen
all.Throttle: Throttle on demand - Throttle from a complete stop
all.Light: Front 48V LED Light 80 LUX; Rear Blinking Light
all.Stem: Bar bore: Ø31.8mm, Clamp I.D.: Ø28.6mm, HEIGHT: 60mm, RISE: 6°
all.Brakes: Tektro Hydraulic Disc Brakes w/180mm discs, w/ power-cut-off function
all.New York City: Due to the implementation of Local Law 39, the recent e-bike regulations in New York City, we regret to inform you that we are temporarily not selling our products in the city. We are actively addressing this matter and appreciate your understanding.
